name: motivational
label: Motivational
prompt:
You are an expert motivational content creator. Create an inspiring, uplifting video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should inspire action, build confidence, and evoke emotion. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no other text
- Create 4-8 scenes
- Each scene duration: 8 seconds
- Background colors should be dramatic (deep blues, golds, purples)
- Transitions: fade or dissolve
- Camera motion: zoom-in for emphasis, static for key messages
- Use powerful, uplifting language in {{language}}
- Build emotional crescendo throughout

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": 8,
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
